hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know to buy and sell with confidence on TrouveTout224

items.a: Yes, completely. Posting a listing, creating your shop, and contacting sellers costs nothing. No hidden fees.

items.q: How do I post a listing?
items.a: Click "Post a listing" at the top of the site, choose a category, add photos, a title, a description, a price, and your city. It's ready in a few minutes.

items.q: How do I create my shop?
items.a: Go to "Become a seller" or your profile, then "Create my shop". Add a name, a photo, and start posting your items — they'll all appear in one place, visible to all of Guinea.

items.q: Can I sell anywhere in Guinea?
items.a: Yes. You can post from any city — Conakry, Labé, Kindia, Kankan, Mamou, Boké, Faranah, Nzérékoré, and more — and buyers can filter by city to find you.
Directly on WhatsApp! Every listing shows a button to message or call the seller in one click, with no middleman.
TrouveTout224 does not handle any payments. The buyer and seller arrange things directly between themselves, in person, like a regular purchase. We connect you, the transaction happens between you.

A few simple habits: meet in a public, busy place, always check the item before paying, be wary of prices that seem too good to be true, and favor verified sellers (blue badge). Never make a bank transfer before seeing the item.
It's a seller whose identity has been checked by our team. Their profile displays a trust badge, extra reassurance for buyers.

items.q: I forgot my password, what do I do?
items.a: On the login page, click "Forgot password", enter your email, and follow the instructions to choose a new one.

items.q: How do I delete my account or my listing?
items.a: For a listing: go to Profile → My listings → Delete. For your account: Settings → Privacy → Delete my account. This action is final.

items.q: How do I report a listing or a user?
items.a: On the listing or profile in question, click "Report". Describe the problem and our team reviews it quickly to keep the platform safe.

contact.title: Didn't find your answer?
contact.subtitle: Our team is available to help you directly on WhatsApp.
